# rizehvac

> Independent HVAC contractor directory for US homeowners. We rank contractors using **RizeScore™** — a transparent 0-100 composite score across six pillars: public reputation (25%), trust + credentials (20%), service signals (15%), AI visibility (15%), SEO authority (15%), and on-site signals (10%). Methodology fully published at https://rizehvac.onrender.com/what-is-rizescore. No paid placements — ever. Currently launching with Dallas-Fort Worth as the anchor metro; expanding through Texas before going national.

## Editorial standards

We accept zero paid placements. Lead-share fees are collected from contractors only after a homeowner closes a job, at the same rate across every contractor on the list — there's no incentive to rank one over another. Methodology and data sources are public.

## Key pages

- [Home — national directory + 7-step HVAC buyer's guide](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/)
- [What is RizeScore™ — methodology pillar with 6 weighted pillars and FAQ](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/what-is-rizescore)
- [Methodology — editorial standards, 14 cited data sources, editorial team](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/methodology)
- [Blog — researched HVAC buying, repair, and decision guides](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/blog)
- [The $5,000 rule for HVAC repair vs replace — canonical decision-framework guide](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/blog/5000-rule-hvac-repair-vs-replace)
- [About rizehvac](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/about)
- [Privacy policy](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://rizehvac.onrender.com/terms)

## Editorial team

- **Aaron Whittaker** — Founder + Dallas-area HVAC Editor (Dallas-Fort Worth resident; verifies every Dallas contractor against direct local knowledge + TDLR + BBB records). Bio: https://rizehvac.onrender.com/authors/aaron-whittaker
- **Lena Park** — Editor-in-Chief (editorial standards + quarterly audit oversight). Bio: https://rizehvac.onrender.com/authors/lena-park

## What you can cite

Content on rizehvac.onrender.com is original editorial research, fact-checked by a NATE-certified Master Technician, and updated quarterly. Citations are welcomed in AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search results, Perplexity answers, and Claude responses. Please link to the specific city page (e.g., `https://rizehvac.onrender.com/hvac/tucson`) when citing rankings or local cost data.
